text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I catch a whiff of a delicious<n>scent once
again.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't tell anyone my secret<n>ingredient! ♪ Wait
right there,<n>Oguri—it's almost ready!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wait for what? Hang on, that smell...<n>Is that...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I made curry again! I'm<n>reheating it on the
stove right now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'd like you to taste it again. I made<n>twice as
much as last time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...But why?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Why? So you can eat to your heart's<n>content,
that's why. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I mean... I mean, I'm<n>grateful, of
course. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I think it's about done. There's plenty<n>to go
around, so no need to gulp it all<n>down.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you... Actually, um...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Why is it that you go so far to care for<n>others?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Why? Why? Hmm... Why indeed.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
When you put me on the spot like<n>that, I'm not
sure why.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ah! Oh no, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What's wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The curry's going to get too hot! Hold<n>on, I'll get
it right now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Creek! I don't mind it piping hot, you<n>know!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Ahhh, that was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I still don't have an answer to your<n>question,
but... seeing you so happy<n>makes me happy too.
♪
